MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-13-2021 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Set For Trial On Aug-02-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendants Janice Rapp, Patrick Russell, Sarah Ervin, Marina Mitchell And Jeffrey Galt'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint [Stipulated Continuance From May 11, 2020. Oppos. Already Filed. Reply Due 5 Court Days Before Hearing Date. Per Email Dated 7/22/2020]
Off Calendar Sep-16-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Defendants Janice Rapp, Patrick Russell, Sarah Ervin, Marina Mitchell, and Jeffrey Galt's Demurrer to 1st Amended Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The demurrer to the first cause of action for breach of contract is overruled. (See Word minutes for complete ruling).

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
